nasb.text: So they said to him, “What should we do to you that the sea may become calm for us?”—for the sea was becoming increasingly stormy.

esv.text: Then they said to him, “What shall we do to you, that the sea may quiet down for us?” For the sea grew more and more tempestuous.

cnv.text: 因為海浪越來越洶湧，他們又對他說：“我們該怎樣處置你，才能叫海浪平靜呢？”

ccb.text: 那时，风浪越来越大，他们便对约拿说：“我们要怎样处置你，才能使风浪平静呢？”

csbs.text: 他们又对他说：“我们该对你怎么做，才能使海为我们平静下来呢？”因为海浪越来越汹涌了。
